label: 本地 tagger 辅助 · 文本
prompt:
A local tagger pre-tagged this image. Use these tags as a reference, but trust the image itself and fix or drop any that are wrong:
{{tags}}

Write a natural-language caption describing the image. Then review the tags above and find any whose meaning your caption did not already convey. Put those uncovered tags first, comma-separated, then append your natural-language caption (also comma-separated). Respond with a single line, no labels and no JSON:
<uncovered tags>, <natural-language caption>
